We unify your

messaging
, and
AI
into a single platform, so every interaction with your
customers
is
stronger
and more
relevant
than the last
Intelligence that compounds.
The more you use the platform, the sharper it gets.
Orchestration that scales.
One platform for every channel, message type, industry, and geography.
Built for agents, not just humans.
Works with any AI tool using MCP, CLI, API or webhooks.
Capabilities
Everything you need to
engage customers
Platform overview
Journeys
Build automated campaigns that improve with every send.
Audiences
Reach the right people using data-driven segmentation.
Data & integrations
Use your customer data to drive better personalization.
Design Studio
Create beautiful messages at scale without complexity.
Analytics
Surface insights that help you deliver business performance.
AI Agent
Meet your AI Agent
Tell it what you want, and it gets to work so your team spends less time configuring and more time on what matters most.
Meet your Agent
Build campaigns in a conversation
Go from a single prompt to a fully configured campaign with triggers, content, timing, and logic, so you can launch more quickly.
Analyze performance instantly
Ask how any campaign is doing and get clear, data-grounded recommendations.
Remember everything about your business
Your Agent automatically carries your brand voice, goals, and preferences across every session.
Solutions
Support every stage of the
customer journey
Activation
Guide new users toward meaningful actions using behavioral triggers.
Retention
Respond proactively to engagement signals and churn risk.
Cross-sell & upsell
Personalize cross-sell and upsell campaigns based on product usage.
Onboarding
Create welcome flows that ensure new users are ready to take first steps.
Enterprise ready
Infrastructure built for teams and the
 agents that support them
Integrations
Integrates with the tools
you use most
Connect your data, apps, and AI tools to a single platform that scales with your business.
Security
Security you
can trust
Protect customer data with enterprise-grade safeguards for both your team and AI agents.
Support
Support you can
count on
Email and chat support are available, with hands-on implementation and ongoing guidance when you need it.
Case studies
Trusted to power billions of
customer interactions

integrations.title: Integrations | Customer.io
integrations.text:
Integrations | Customer.io
Website Data Collection Preferences
We use cookies and other tracking technologies to create a more personalized experience. You can find more information about how we use these services in our
Privacy Policy
and
Cookie Declaration
. By clicking 'I Accept,' you consent to the use of cookies and other tracking technologies.
I accept
Manage preferences
Reject all
Necessary
Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
Always on
Preferences
Remembers your settings and personalisation choices.
Statistics
Helps us understand how visitors interact with the website.
Marketing
Used to track visitors across websites to display relevant ads.
Save preferences
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Sign in
Get started
Get started
Book a demo
Book a demo
Customer.io Integrations
Integrate
your
favorite
tools
Synchronize your data to unlock the full potential of the tools you rely on most. Gain actionable insights and drive personalized experiences by activating your tech stack with seamless data connectivity.
Sources
Integrate your data warehouses and other sources to personalize and power your campaigns. Connect your first-party data via pre-built integrations, APIs, SDKs, webhooks, and more.
Source catalog
Destinations
Effortlessly transfer data to external destinations. Customer.io supports multiple integration options for key use cases like campaign reporting or the creation of lookalike audiences for ads.
Destination catalog
Customer top picks
Featured
integrations
Amazon S3
Streamline data transfer from Customer.io to Amazon S3 storage, including messages, people, metrics, and more.
Learn more
Amplitude
Enhance your audience insights by integrating Amplitude's data with your user and analytics data.
Learn more
Branch
Enable seamless email-to-app linking by integrating Branch with your messaging workflows.

analysis.name: Customer.io
analysis.value_proposition: Turn customer data into personalized experiences with a platform that gets more powerful over time.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product-led and lifecycle marketing teams sending data-powered, cross-channel customer engagement at scale

features.name: in-app messages
features.description: In-product messaging to engage users contextually

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: SMS message sends via Twilio integration

features.name: webhook messaging
features.description: Send and receive webhooks as a message channel

features.name: custom smtp
features.description: Bring your own SMTP for email delivery

features.name: scalable personalization
features.description: Personalize messages at scale using customer data

features.name: ai agent
features.description: Conversational AI agent that builds campaigns and analyzes performance
features.evidence_quote: Meet your AI Agent... Build campaigns in a conversation

features.description: AI Agent remembers brand voice and preferences across sessions

features.description: Custom AI Agent skills (3 on Essentials, 10 Premium)

features.description: Store and query nested data structures

features.name: ad audience sync

differentiators: AI Agent with persistent memory that remembers brand voice across sessions
Works with any AI tool via MCP, CLI, API, or webhooks — built for agents, not just humans
Custom objects and non-people data modeling for B2B/marketplace use cases
Unlimited user seats on every plan
Native WhatsApp and LINE channels alongside email/SMS/push
US and EU data centers with HIPAA availability

recent_ships.source: Automatically clean up stale segments — Auto-archive is an optional, workspace-level setting that archives unused dynamic segments

recent_ships.what: Converter tool for classic emails → Design Studio
recent_ships.source: Use our converter tool to migrate emails made in the classic drag-and-drop editor to Design Studio
We've made it easy to set up a notification inbox for your website, complete with messages styled to match your brand's look and feel

praised: 'Customer.io has become the heartbeat of our lifecycle marketing strategy, empowering us to communicate with users in a way that feels genuinely relevant and personal.' — Simon Heaton, Director of Growth Marketing
'Because we have every event flowing into Customer.io, we were able to build a journey that adapts to what each user is actually doing—or not doing.' — Sue Cho, Head of Lifecycle Marketing
complaints: Reports of extended outage (HN: 'Customer.io Extended Outage')
Open-source alternatives being pursued by developers (HN: 'Email marketing as code (open source Customer.io alternative)')

free_tier.limits: 14-day free trial only; free full year via Startup Program for companies that raised under $10M

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5k profiles, 1M emails/mo, 2 object types, visual workflow builder, AI Agent core skills

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom profile/email volumes, 10 object types, elevated AI Agent, HIPAA, premium integrations

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Dedicated hardware, audit logging, CSM, migration support, priority support

pricing.notes: Essentials billed monthly; Premium/Enterprise annual only. Overages: $0.009 per additional profile, $0.12 per additional 1,000 emails, $10 per 100K additional AI credits. Essentials capped at 2 workspaces; Premium+ unlimited. HIPAA and some support items marked as *additional cost.
